purpose: Provides an invariant ordering framework for cycle positioning across technology investment booms, identifying which stage the current AI cycle occupies
components: Stage 1: Breadth deterioration (ACTIVE — confirmed with 800-1200bp equal-weighted underperformance)
Stage 2: Revenue validation failure (NOT YET TRIGGERED — no major hyperscaler AI revenue disappointment)
Stage 4: Credit transmission (6-12 month lag from equity stress)
current_assessment: Stage 1 is active and confirmed. Stage 2 has not triggered. The narrative validation window for Stage 2 is Q3 2026-Q2 2027 (±2-3 quarters). The self-funded capex structure may extend the patience period between stages beyond historical precedent. Stage boundaries are fuzzy but ordering is empirically strong across 7 cataloged episodes.
limitations: Stage boundaries are fuzzy and not precisely identifiable in real-time
Self-funded capex at 55% passive has no historical precedent
Specific thresholds (55-65% capex/OCF, 4 quarters ROIC < WACC) are refuted
Cannot distinguish Stage 1 duration from false positive
